scenes.subtitle_text: GluMira — pharmacokinetic insulin visualisation for clinical education.
scenes.voice_text: GluMira provides pharmacokinetic insulin visualisation powered by the IOB Hunter engine. Here's what your patients will see.

scenes.visual_note: Clinical stacking view with pressure zones
scenes.subtitle_text: Real-time stacking analysis with exponential decay and Gaussian peak modelling.
scenes.voice_text: The stacking curve uses exponential decay with Gaussian peak modifiers for each insulin in the thirteen-insulin ZA-NAM formulary.

scenes.subtitle_text: Pattern Intelligence detects timing anomalies across 7-day rolling windows.
scenes.voice_text: The Pattern Intelligence Engine analyses seven-day rolling windows, detecting dose compression, dawn phenomenon, rescue clusters, and contextual modifiers.

scenes.visual_note: Two-page clinical report with basal evaluation gauge
scenes.subtitle_text: Export two-page PDF reports with basal evaluation scoring for consultations.
scenes.voice_text: Exportable two-page reports include dose heatmaps, stacking curves, and a basal evaluation gauge scored out of ten.
